name: Trenchant Capital Corp.
summary: Trenchant Capital Corp. is a private equity and venture capital firm specializing in special situation debt financing in private equity companies. The firm seeks to invest in Canada. The company was formerly known as Echelon Petroleum Corp. and changed its name to Trenchant Capital Corp. in May 2017. Trenchant Capital Corp. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
